    • from

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder from(GetObservationsV2Request other)

    • environment

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder environment(Optional<List<String>> environment)

      Optional filter for observations where the environment is one of the provided values.

    • environment

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder environment(List<String> environment)

    • environment

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder environment(String environment)

    • fields

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder fields(Optional<String> fields)

      Comma-separated list of field groups to include in the response. Available groups: core, basic, time, io, metadata, model, usage, prompt, metrics. If not specified, core and basic field groups are returned. Example: "basic,usage,model"

    • fields

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder fields(String fields)

    • expandMetadata

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder expandMetadata(Optional<String> expandMetadata)

      Comma-separated list of metadata keys to return non-truncated. By default, metadata values over 200 characters are truncated. Use this parameter to retrieve full values for specific keys. Example: "key1,key2"

    • expandMetadata

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder expandMetadata(String expandMetadata)

    • limit

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder limit(Optional<Integer> limit)

      Number of items to return per page. Maximum 1000, default 50.

    • limit

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder limit(Integer limit)

    • cursor

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder cursor(Optional<String> cursor)

      Base64-encoded cursor for pagination. Use the cursor from the previous response to get the next page.

    • cursor

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder cursor(String cursor)

    • parseIoAsJson

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder parseIoAsJson(Optional<Boolean> parseIoAsJson)

      Deprecated. Setting this to true will return a 400 error. Input/output fields are always returned as raw strings. Remove this parameter or set it to false.

    • filter

      public GetObservationsV2Request.Builder filter(Optional<String> filter)
      JSON string containing an array of filter conditions. When provided, this takes precedence over query parameter filters (userId, name, type, level, environment, fromStartTime, ...).
